body_txt: noreallife  A trope where a character ( Always Male ) grabs onto the breasts of another ( Always Female ), with the latter complaining about the action of the former, usually by accident. It usually leads to several outcomes: either the second character reacts violently and/or complains (or resents the former), forgives the former, or uses the opportunity to blackmail the former into doing a certain deed (or certain deeds), with refusing to do so having consequences that the first character most surely don't want to undergo. Characters who are Accidental Perverts are contractually obligated to have this happen at least once, if not Once per Episode . Subtrope of Suggestive Collision . Somewhat related to Funbag Airbag . See also Not What It Looks Like . Compare and contrast with Skinship Grope . Contrast Copping a Feel , where the contact is deliberate.
